introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: S-hat Sub Jright
introduced_concepts.definition: Hods of LW Appendix 1 can be used to obtain approximate large-sample variances for estimators of differentials and gradients.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: S-hat Sub Jright 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

views.name: Selection Differential
views.definition: The change in mean trait value caused by selection before transmission.
views.definition_zh: 选择作用在遗传传递之前造成的平均性状值变化。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.

introduced_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
